query: Recent French 2027 presidential first-round voting intention polls testing Marine Le Pen by name, June-July 2026, with pollster, fieldwork dates, and Le Pen percentage. Include Ifop, Harris Interactive, Toluna, Elabe, Odoxa, IFOP polls.
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of what I found on recent French 2027 presidential first-round polls testing Marine Le Pen by name in June–July 2026:

**Key context:** Marine Le Pen declared her candidacy on July 7, 2026 (TF1), immediately triggering a cluster of post-announcement polls that all placed her clearly first at 34–36%.

**Post-announcement polls (July 7–10, 2026):**
- **Ifop** (LCI & Le Figaro), July 7–8, n=984: **Le Pen 36%** (+4 pts in two weeks)
- **Toluna Harris Interactive** (RTL & M6), July 7–8, n=1,592: **34–36%** across 5 scenarios
- **OpinionWay** (Les Échos & Radio Classique), July 8–9, n=963: **35%**
- **Elabe** (BFMTV & La Tribune Dimanche), July 9–10, n~1,503: **34–35.5%**

**Pre-announcement June/late-May references:**
- Ifop-Fiducial, June 22–24: ~32%
- OpinionWay, June 10–11: ~33%
- Ipsos-BVA, May 27–28: ~31%

**Notes:** Odoxa (Backbone Consulting/Le Figaro, published July 8) focused on approval of her candidacy rather than a clean first-round headline. The clear trajectory is a rise from ~31–33% pre-announcement to a 34–36% cluster after her July 7 declaration. I flagged one aggregator with garbled figures (~14.5%) that conflicts with all primary sources and disregarded it.

All figures are of registered voters intending to vote (French standard methodology), ±~3 points margin of error, with multiple rival line-up hypotheses producing the ranges. Full sourcing is in the structured output.

sources.title: Les intentions de vote a l'election presidentielle 2027 apres la declaration de candidature de Marine Le Pen
sources.snippet: Ifop for LCI and Le Figaro, fieldwork July 7-8, 2026, 984 registered voters: Le Pen 36% in both scenarios, +4 points in two weeks.

sources.title: Intentions de vote a l'election presidentielle 2027 - Toluna
sources.snippet: Toluna Harris Interactive for RTL & M6, July 7-8, 2026, 1,592 registered voters: Le Pen 34-36% across configurations.

sources.title: Presidentielle 2027: Marine Le Pen en tete des intentions de vote au premier tour
sources.snippet: OpinionWay for Les Echos and Radio Classique, July 8-9, 2026, 963 respondents: Le Pen 35%, Philippe 18%, Melenchon 13%.

sources.title: Les Francais et l'election presidentielle 2027 - Elabe
sources.snippet: Elabe for BFMTV and La Tribune Dimanche: Le Pen 34-35.5% first round depending on configuration, +3 points since March 2026.

sources.title: Sondages presidentielle 2027 : tous les resultats | SP2027
sources.snippet: Aggregated first-round polls: Elabe 9-10 Jul 35%, OpinionWay 8-9 Jul 35%, Ifop-Fiducial 7-8 Jul 36%, Toluna Harris 7-8 Jul 35%, Ifop-Fiducial 22-24 Jun 32%, OpinionWay 10-11 Jun 33%, Ipsos-BVA 27-28 May 31%.

sources.title: Sondage Odoxa: une majorite de Francais valide la candidature de Marine Le Pen en 2027
sources.snippet: Odoxa for Backbone Consulting and Le Figaro, published July 8, 2026: majority of French say Le Pen is right to run.

sources.title: Presidentielle 2027 - EPOC Info (moyennes)
sources.snippet: First-round running average: Bardella 35%, Le Pen 33.8%, Philippe 18.4%, Attal 14%, Melenchon 13.3%, Glucksmann 12.1%.

sources.title: Presidentielle: Le Pen demarre sa campagne largement en tete (sondages)
sources.snippet: AFP, July 8, 2026: Le Pen at 36% first round per Ifop for LCI/Le Figaro, gaining 4 points vs mid-June; lead up to 17 points over Philippe.
